abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: U Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (r) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Reformation
abilities.text: During the end phase, if a friendly Ashen Core is in base contact, replace this model and the Ashen Core with an Ashes and Dust. Then, the new model heals 2.

actions.name: Suffocating Dust
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3. For each raise this action receives, the target gains this model's choice of a Staggered, Injured, or Slow token.

triggers.name: Choke
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)3" with an Injured token are dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Savage Winds
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Until the end of this activation, enemy models this model moves through gain an Injured token.
